summary: Clarified sync, doctor, MCP, and skill surfaces so agents read existing cached history instead of treating live-source refresh failures as no data.
reason: AQL live eval found agents reflexively synced before reads and refused to answer when the live Safari source was unavailable despite queryable snapshot/archive cache data.
validated_outcome: go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test ./... passed; peer-test review added write-tool negative steering assertion, archive-enabled doctor coverage, and archive status cached_store branch coverage.
